prose: The frontier-orbitals task on furan was performed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase, with charge 0 and multiplicity 1. Results: HOMO energy approximately -6.36 eV, LUMO energy approximately -0.102 eV, HOMO-LUMO gap approximately 6.26 eV. Orbital details: HOMO index 17, energy -6.36 eV; LUMO index 18, energy -0.102 eV. SCF converged in 9 cycles, energies are finite and trustworthy.
